title: Main Schema.
description: Main Schema for an AI project file.

description.title: The AI project description
description.description: A short description about what the project is about.

uuid.title: The UUID Schema.
uuid.description: A unique identifier for the project: use right-click + 'Generate UUID'.

version.title: The AI project version.
version.description: The version of the AI project (x.y.z).

creation_time.title: The AI project creation time.
creation_time.description: The creation timestamp of the AI project (x.y.z).

last_update_time.title: The AI project creation time.
last_update_time.description: The last update timestamp of the AI project (x.y.z).

owner.title: The AI project owner.
owner.description: The owner/author of the AI project.

reference.title: The reference to father project (if any).
reference.description: A reference to a related project (UUID).

models.description: Models Schema for the models section of an AI project file.

deployments.description: Deployments Schema for the deployments section of an AI project file.
